response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional general software engineering leadership and architectural thinking, this role requires deep C++ expertise and industrial automation domain knowledge that are fundamentally absent. Current experience (15 years at re:cinq) is in TypeScript/Node.js/React web platforms, with C++ work limited to the early 2000s. The candidate lacks any background in IoT manufacturing, industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA), or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), which are core to the role.
strengths: 30+ years of software development with multiple senior/staff roles demonstrating sustained technical leadership and mentorship capabilities
Strong track record designing event-driven architectures and fostering quality-first practices (TDD, testing frameworks, CI/CD)
Proven ability to mentor and elevate teams through teaching courses, creating testing libraries, and building development communities
concerns: C++ expertise is outdated (2000–2001 at National Instruments, thesis work); current 15-year role uses TypeScript/Node.js with no C++ exposure
No background in industrial automation, IoT manufacturing, or industrial security/compliance (IEC 62443, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, Modbus protocols)
Educational credentials are BS Computer Science; job specifies B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech engineering degree

key_factors.factor: Strong general software leadership and architecture skills
